review_history.summary: The early-resolution fixture tests target binding, fixed query order, honest early stop, metadata-only handoff, conservative claim seed, and rerouting without operating later surfaces.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: target and knowledge need are bound before a query-first plan
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: the current canon/advisory/evidence/archive order is explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: sufficient first-surface refs force honest not-inspected/not-needed later states
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: source recommendation, uncertainty, claim seed, target handoff, and reroute triggers are covered
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: NotebookLM, payload, target completion, source truth, owner, ontology, and canon authority are barred
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: raw/private/secret, runtime path, golden, and fabricated execution/read risks are gated

no_golden_finding: pass: supplied coverage metadata is not an expected handoff body and criteria are phrasing-independent.
residual_gaps: No registry, Obsidian, NotebookLM, workmeta, source packet, Drive, or target workflow surface was actually inspected or run.
